living_flesh: your living skin, muscle, and natural warmth begin to shift
your warm living body starts to rework itself beneath the surface
your natural flesh softens, tightens, and begins changing into something new
metal: your metal plating, precise joints, and mechanical rigidity begin to break apart
your hard metal body starts to unlock, plates shifting and seams opening
your mechanical frame shudders as its rigid plating begins to lose its shape
porcelain: your glossy porcelain surface loses its hard, delicate stillness
your ceramic body begins to loosen, its polished surface no longer holding firm
your porcelain shell trembles as its painted stillness starts to give way
plastic: your smooth plastic surface starts to loosen from its fixed, artificial shape
your rigid plastic body begins to flex and distort away from its display-perfect form
your polished artificial surface softens from its fixed plastic shape
plush_fabric: your plush fabric, soft stuffing, and stitched seams begin to pull into a new shape
your stuffed body compresses and shifts, seams tugging as the fabric starts to change
your soft plush surface bunches and reforms as the stuffing inside rearranges
rubber: your glossy rubber body stretches and deforms away from its toy-like shape
your flexible rubber surface pulls and bends as your toy-like body starts to change
your squeaky rubber form warps, stretching away from its old rounded shape
slime: your colourful slime body ripples, stretches, and gathers itself into a new outline
your gooey form wobbles and pulls inward, its glossy colours shifting as it reshapes
your soft slime surface flows over itself, losing its old outline as the change begins
water: your liquid body swirls and draws together, its rippling surface changing course
your watery form gathers into new currents, flowing away from its old shape
your clear liquid body ripples and folds as its outline starts to reform
ghostly_mist: your misty, translucent body gathers inward, its drifting edges condensing into a solid outline
your ghostly form pulls together, pale vapour thickening as the old shape fades
your translucent edges stop drifting freely and begin drawing into a new form
plant_matter: your leaves, vines, blossoms, and living plant matter begin to rearrange
your leafy body rustles and shifts as vines and petals pull into a new pattern
your plant-like form creaks softly as stems, leaves, and blossoms start to change
stone: your stone-like body grinds and smooths as its sculpted surface begins to change
your carved surface cracks into motion, stone dust shimmering as your body reforms
your heavy stone body starts to shift, its rigid surface smoothing into a new shape
honey: your glossy honeyed body thickens, flows, and pulls into a new shape
your amber body stretches in slow syrupy ribbons as it starts to reform
your sticky golden surface ripples and gathers, dragging itself into a new outline
candy_floss: your fluffy candyfloss body compresses, its sugary softness twisting into a new form
your airy sugar-spun body collapses into denser swirls as the change begins
your pastel fluff twists and tightens, sugary strands pulling into a fresh shape
synthetic_skin: your artificial skin, hidden mechanisms, and perfectly controlled body begin to shift
your synthetic surface tightens as hidden systems rearrange beneath it
your smooth artificial body recalibrates, its hidden structure changing under the surface

living_flesh: warming and softening into living skin, flexible limbs, natural hair, and expressive movement
becoming warm living flesh again, with soft skin, natural motion, and expressive features
settling into organic skin, flexible joints, natural warmth, and lifelike movement
metal: forming polished metal plating, precise joints, mechanical seams, and a faint artificial hum
locking into smooth metal panels, neat mechanical joints, and softly humming machinery
becoming polished metal and clockwork precision, with seams, plates, and mechanical motion
porcelain: settling into glossy porcelain, painted features, delicate surfaces, and doll-like stillness
becoming cool polished porcelain, with painted detail, fragile surfaces, and careful stillness
smoothing into ceramic perfection, glossy and delicate, with painted features and posed grace
plastic: settling into smooth rigid plastic, polished artificial features, and display-perfect stillness
becoming sleek polished plastic, firm and artificial, with a display-ready finish
hardening into smooth plastic curves, fixed poise, and a flawless mannequin-like surface
plush_fabric: softening into plush fabric, padded paws or limbs, stitched seams, and squeezable stuffing
becoming soft fabric and stuffing, with stitched details and a cuddly toy-like body
rounding into plush softness, padded limbs, fuzzy texture, and huggable stuffed shape
rubber: becoming glossy rubber, rounded toy-like surfaces, flexible curves, and squeaky movement
turning bright and rubbery, with smooth toy-like curves and a soft squeak in every movement
settling into flexible rubber, shiny surfaces, rounded edges, and bath-toy wobble
slime: melting into colourful translucent slime, stretchy limbs, glossy drips, and wobbly motion
becoming soft glossy slime, with rippling colours, stretchy movement, and jelly-like wobble
flowing into translucent goo, bright and squishy, with drips, ripples, and elastic motion
water: flowing into clear living water, rippling skin, liquid movement, and drifting droplets
becoming fluid and translucent, with watery skin, smooth currents, and droplets trailing behind
settling into living water, your outline rippling with every movement and splash of light
ghostly_mist: fading into pale ghostly mist, translucent edges, weightless movement, and a soft spectral glow
becoming light and spectral, with misty edges, transparent skin, and a quiet ghostly shimmer
dissolving into soft supernatural vapour, leaving a translucent body that drifts more than walks
plant_matter: blooming into living plant matter, leafy details, curling vines, blossoms, and earthy texture
becoming green and living, with vines, leaves, flowers, and soft woodland texture spreading through you
settling into plant-like life, with petals, curling stems, leafy growth, and a fresh earthy scent
stone: solidifying into sculpted stone, smooth carved surfaces, heavy stillness, and statue-like poise
becoming cool carved stone, heavy and polished, with statue-like grace and stillness
settling into sculpted solidity, smooth mineral surfaces, and the poised weight of a living statue
honey: turning glossy and golden, with syrupy movement, amber shine, and thick honeyed texture
becoming warm amber sweetness, thick and glossy, with slow honeyed motion
settling into golden syrupy shine, sticky smoothness, and slow nectar-like movement
candy_floss: puffing into soft candyfloss texture, sugary colours, fluffy volume, and drifting sweet sparkles
becoming airy spun sugar, soft and pastel, with fluffy volume and sugary shimmer
settling into cloudlike candyfloss, light and sweet, with pastel strands and sparkling sugar dust
synthetic_skin: settling into smooth synthetic skin, hidden robotic structure, precise movement, and an artificial humanoid finish
becoming sleek synthetic skin over hidden machinery, with flawless surfaces and controlled movement
settling into an artificial humanoid body, smooth outside and mechanical beneath, with precise graceful motion
